heading: Transmission of reports
label: 4691 Transmission of reports
text: Each report issued by a rapid response labor panel constituted in accordance with Annex 31–A of the USMCA shall be immediately submitted to the appropriate congressional committees, the Labor Advisory Committee established under (or successor advisory committee), and, as appropriate, the petitioner submitting information pursuant to . The Trade Representative shall also make each such report publicly available in a timely manner.section 2155(c)(1) of this titlesection 4646 of this title
